subcodes.first_line: O daughter of the Kingdom! Thy letter of September 30, 1910, was received, expressing joy and gladness at my journey [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه ۳۰ سبتمبر ۱۹۱۰ وصول یافت اظهار سرور و شادمانی از سفر من
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @martyrs and martyrdom, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
